resources.string: Password must be at least 6 characters
No account found with this email
Too many attempts. Please try again later
Please sign in again, then retry.
This email is already registered. Sign in with email & password.
This sign-in method is not available on this device.
Something went wrong. Please try again
We could not reach sign-in. Please try again. If it keeps happening, contact support@getstitchpad.com
Your session has expired. Please sign in again
This sign-in method isn't supported yet
Password must be at least 6 characters
Name must be at least 2 characters
Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
Business name must be at least 2 characters
Every measurement, order, and customer in one place.
Never lose a customer's measurements again
Store chest, waist, hip and all body measurements safely in one place.
Track orders from cutting to delivery
Know exactly which orders are pending, in progress, or ready for pickup.
Simple, fast, and built for fashion designers who work on their phones.
Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
We've sent a password reset link to %1$s
We've sent a verification link to %1$s. Tap it to continue, then come back here.
Not verified yet. Tap the link in your inbox, then try again.
See revenue trends, top customers, production status, and outstanding balances at a glance.
Hi %1$s, friendly reminder — you have an outstanding balance of ₦%2$s on your order. Could you settle it when convenient? Thanks!
Take your first order to start seeing your numbers here.
No customers yet. Tap + to add one.
Tap to add your first customer
No saved customer matches “%1$s”. Try a different name or phone number.
Remove %1$s from your customer list? This cannot be undone.
%1$s has %2$d active order(s). Mark them delivered or remove the orders first, then try again.
Loading order data — please try again in a moment.
Couldn't load order data. Check your connection and try again.
Safe and searchable. Unlock anytime to take new orders.
This customer is locked because you have more than your Free plan allows. Upgrade to Tailor Pro to view them, or swap with one of your active customers.
All data preserved. To start a new order, take new measurements, or edit this profile, unlock or swap.
Pick one of your active customers to lock instead.
Couldn't swap. Try again in a moment.
We'll save them, then take you to their measurements.
A customer with this name already exists
You've reached your customer limit. Upgrade to add more.
No measurements yet. Tap to record one.
e.g. Prefers loose fit around the chest…
No measurements yet. Tap + to add one.
This measurement will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
Could not save measurement. Please try again.
Add your own measurements to this customer’s form.
Add measurements that aren’t on the default list — like cuff width, lapel, or gown sweep. They’ll appear here for every customer.
Define measurements that don’t appear on the default list. Available on Pro.
Define a measurement you’d like to track for your customers.
“%1$s” will stop appearing on new measurements. Values already saved stay visible on past measurements.
Tap ✕ to remove · ＋ to add more
Add photos of past work or inspiration for this customer.
Save looks you love here, then use them for any customer.
This style photo will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
No other customers to send this to yet.
A folder with that name already exists.
All styles inside this folder will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
This folder is full (%1$d styles). Upgrade for more room.
This folder holds %1$d styles. Remove some and try again.
You've reached your plan's folder limit. Upgrade to create more folders and keep your collections organised.
You've reached your plan's style limit. Upgrade for more room — organise your styles into folders and save many more.
Tailor Atelier is our highest tier — you've already unlocked everything StitchPad has to offer.
This is the most folders a customer's closet can hold on any plan. Remove one to make room, or keep adding styles to your existing folders.
This style is locked. Upgrade to Pro to edit it.
e.g. Red agbada with gold trim
Couldn't verify your folder. Check your connection and try again.
Could not save style. Please try again.
Photo is too large. Please pick one under 5 MB.
Upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.
Tap to create your first order
Try another tab to see your orders
Orders you archive show up here. You can restore them anytime.
This order will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
₦%1$s has already been recorded as paid. Deleting will erase that from your revenue record.
Deleting removes it from your pipeline and clears its status history. This cannot be undone.
e.g. cream agbada, gold embroidery, long sleeves
Pick from the list, or add a new one.
Add "%1$s" as a new garment type
No common type matches "%1$s" — that's OK, add it as your own.
Save to your list for next time
Choose what you're making, enter a quantity, and enter a price to continue.
Save new style photos to saved styles
No saved styles yet for this customer
Please add at least one item
%1$s still owes ₦%2$s. You can record a payment now or mark ready and collect when they pick up.
%1$s still owes ₦%2$s. Marking delivered with an unpaid balance affects your weekly revenue and how this order is tracked.
This order may have been deleted.
Could not save order. Please try again.
Enter a quantity for every item before saving.
Enter a price for every item before saving.
Discount can't be more than the order total.
Deposit can't be more than the order total.
Pick what you're making to save this order.
Could not share receipt. Please try again.
No payment recorded yet — this is a request for payment.
Add your first customer to start tracking orders, measurements, and styles.
Hi %1$s, your %2$s order is ready for collection. Balance: ₦%3$s. — %4$s
Hi %1$s, your %2$s order is now %3$dd past its delivery date. Outstanding balance: ₦%4$s. — %5$s
Couldn't open WhatsApp. Make sure it's installed and try again.
Couldn't open WhatsApp. Make sure it's installed and try again.
Add a customer, save measurements, and create your first custom outfit.
Save measurements for %1$s and start creating their first outfit.
Pick a customer, save their measurements, and create their first outfit.
Add a due date and collect a deposit to stay on track.
%1$d orders in progress. Use this time to review the work and keep things moving.
%1$d order in progress. Use this time to review the order and keep things moving.
Reach out about pickup or mark delivered
Start your first order to unlock cutting, sewing, fitting, and delivery stages.
Show up when balances or deadlines need follow-up.
Use this time to reconnect with customers or review orders.
Start the next order to see it move from pending → in progress → ready.
Suggested moves appear here when there are payments to collect or orders to chase.
Add a new customer to get started
Create an order for your customer
Plan when the order will be ready
Add the initial payment to the order
Every order starts with a customer. Add your first one to save measurements and start creating outfits made just for them.
Hi %1$s! Hope you're doing well. Just checking in — let me know if you need anything new stitched.
Pick up the pace this week
Start simple and track what you want to earn this month.
Set how much you want to earn this week. We'll track collected revenue as orders come in.
Couldn't save your goal. Check your connection and try again.
Tap to add a note about this order
It will be hidden from the dashboard and orders list. You can restore it from the Archived filter on the Orders tab.
No measurements yet for this customer.
Customer comes in to try on
Hi %1$s, just confirming your order details — I'll be starting work on it soon.
Hi %1$s, quick update on your outfit — work is in progress and on track.
Hi %1$s, your outfit is ready for pickup — let me know what time works for you.
Hi %1$s, hope the outfit suits you well — would love a photo when you wear it!
Hi %1$s, hope you're keeping well! Just checking in from the workshop.
Couldn't open WhatsApp. Make sure it's installed and try again.
Sign in to manage your orders, customers, and payments.
Secure sign-in for your tailoring business.
Get started with StitchPad and manage your tailoring business in one place.
You can add customers, orders, and payments after sign up.
PNG or JPG · Resized automatically for upload
Use a PNG or JPG image
Your logo will no longer appear on the dashboard or receipts.
Enter a valid Nigerian WhatsApp number (10 digits)
Used for reminders and customer follow-up. Make sure WhatsApp is active on this number.
Open WhatsApp, read the 4-digit code in the message we drafted, then enter it below. You don't need to send the message.
StitchPad confirmation code: %1$s — you can delete this message.
That code doesn't match. Check WhatsApp and try again.
Shown on your dashboard. You can change this later.
Customers can pay you direct. Shows on every invoice.
As shown on your bank statement
Add your bank to show these details on invoices
Account number must be exactly 10 digits
Updates, tips & other tailors on WhatsApp
Hi! I've been using StitchPad to manage my tailoring orders and customers — it's been a game-changer. Try it: https://getstitchpad.com
Hi StitchPad team! I need help with
Your customers, measurements, and orders stay safe. Sign back in anytime to pick up where you left off.
1 customer left before your free limit
%1$d customers left before your free limit
Upgrade to keep adding customers, unlock reports, and back up your work.
Upgrade to keep growing — your existing customers are safe and unchanged.
%1$d customers added · no limits this month
You're using AI heavily. Tailor Pro gives you 500 drafts a month.
Tailor Pro gives you 500 drafts a month and unlimited customers.
You used all %1$d AI drafts this month
Tailor Pro gives you 500 drafts a month. Never run out.
You've hit your customer limit and used all AI drafts this month
Tailor Pro: unlimited customers + 500 drafts a month.
Here's why we built it this way
Your first 30 days are unlimited. Bring your whole business in. Every customer, every order, every measurement.
After your first month, we keep your 15 most active customers handy on Free. The rest stay safe and searchable. You can view them anytime and unlock or swap whenever you need to take a new order.
We never delete your customers. We never change your data overnight.
The cap exists because AI calls cost us real money per draft. The 15-customer Free plan keeps the app sustainable while offering a real product to everyone, not a demo, not a trial.
If something feels off, message us directly. We read everything.
Prepaid access via Paystack. No automatic renewal; renew when your period ends.
Auto-renewing subscription billed through your Apple ID. Cancel anytime in your device Settings.
Your purchase is pending approval. We'll unlock your plan once it's confirmed.
Please sign in again before starting checkout.
Add an email address to your account in Settings before upgrading.
That plan is not available. Choose another plan and try again.
Paystack checkout is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
Used in receipts and reminders to customers
Voice line — only set this if it's different from your WhatsApp
Used for customer reminders and receipts
Email changes require security verification — manage from Settings → Account → Email.
Could not save changes. Try again.
Phone number must be 10 digits after +234
WhatsApp number must be 10 digits after +234
We'll send a verification link to your new email. The change takes effect once you click it.
Reset link sent — check your email
For your security, please sign in again before continuing.
You'll be signed out and your account closed. Your business data (customers, measurements, orders) is retained per our policy until our background cleanup runs.
Help us improve — why are you leaving?
Your feedback is anonymous and helps us build a better tool for tailors.
I made a duplicate or wrong account
The app is too complex to use
I was just trying it out
Saving your feedback, removing your data, and signing you out. This usually takes a few seconds.
You've been signed out. Final data cleanup is finishing in the background. Thank you for trying StitchPad.
Could not delete your account. Please try again.
Help with messages, pricing, and more
Draft a WhatsApp message to a customer
%1$d of 5 free drafts left this month
No open orders for this customer.
Add a WhatsApp number to this customer to send directly.
Out of free drafts this month. Upgrade to keep drafting.
No internet. Try again when you're back online.
Couldn't draft right now. Try again in a moment.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
You've used your 50 Pro drafts this month. They reset on the 1st.
Order reminders will show up here.
Couldn't load notifications. Check your connection.
Out of free drafts this month
You've used your 5 free drafts. Upgrade to draft as many as you need.
Your first month ends in %1$d days
After your first month, your 15 most active customers stay active. The rest stay safe and searchable — unlock or swap to take new orders. Upgrade to Pro to keep all of them active.
Get a quick morning reminder of orders due and money owed.
Have a gift code? Enter it to unlock your plan
Enter the gift code from your email or message to unlock your StitchPad plan.
Gift claimed! Your StitchPad plan is now active.
This will apply your gift to %1$s.
This will apply your gift to your StitchPad account.
We couldn't find that gift code. Check it and try again.
This gift has already been claimed.
This gift isn't ready to claim yet. Please try again shortly.
Please sign in to claim your gift.
Let friends, family or clients support your business
Share this link with friends, family or clients. When they open it, they can support your StitchPad plan as a gift.
Couldn't create your gift link. Please try again.
I run my tailoring business on StitchPad. You can support me by covering my subscription plan here: %1$s
Short videos on how everything works
Couldn't load this video. Check your connection and try again.
A 1-minute tour of StitchPad to get you going.
Save a customer's details and measurements in seconds.
Turn a customer request into a tracked order.
Build a lookbook of styles and fabrics for your customers.
See what your business earned and who to follow up with.
A newer version of StitchPad is needed to keep going. Please update to continue.
StitchPad is briefly down for maintenance. Please check back in a few minutes.
